inputs.clip_l: Editorial fashion photography portrait of Luna Solaris, a mystical young woman age 25-30, warm olive-tan skin with natural pores and texture, dark curly hair in messy bun with wisps, warm brown-green eyes, serene knowing expression. Wearing flowing white linen dress, gold hoop earrings, stacked gold bangles. Natural golden hour sunlight through window. Photorealistic photograph, real human skin, 85mm f/1.4, shallow depth of field. NOT illustration, NOT cartoon, NOT CG.
